title: Setting: hide Initiatives from type filter
description:
Add a configuration option that removes the Initiatives option from the toolbar type selector and from the type hierarchy section in the filter sidebar. This is for teams that do not use the initiative issue type and want to save toolbar space.

Scenario: Show Initiatives setting is on by default

Given a fresh installation with no custom configuration
When the user views the toolbar type selector
Then the Initiatives option is visible in the selector
And the Initiatives option is visible in the type hierarchy section of the filter sidebar

Scenario: User turns off Show Initiatives in settings

Given the settings sidebar is open
When the user turns off the Show Initiatives toggle
Then the Initiatives option is removed from the toolbar type selector
And the Initiatives option is removed from the type hierarchy section of the filter sidebar

Scenario: Board is unaffected when Initiatives is hidden and currently selected

Given Show Initiatives is on
And the toolbar type selector has Initiatives selected
When the user turns off Show Initiatives
Then the type selector transitions to the deselected state (no active type filter)
And the board shows all issue types

Scenario: Show Initiatives setting persists across reload

Given the user has turned off Show Initiatives
When the page is reloaded
Then Initiatives remains hidden from the type selector and filter sidebar type section
creator: ryan.porter
